_note: Per-role write sandboxing. Consulted by role_policy.py hook when a per-spawn .role-active-<frag>.json sidecar is present in the active run-dir. write_allow_prefix and write_deny enforce the role's write scope. Roles not listed have no extra restrictions beyond terminal_policy global allow/deny.

tester._intent: Tester writes only into test directories. Production code edits go through build role.

skeptic._intent: Skeptic produces verdict files + reads. No production writes.

security-auditor._intent: Security-auditor writes verdicts + audit notes. No production writes.

plan._intent: Plan writes the plan file at ~/.pipeline/plans/-<slug>/<id>.md.
